steps.description: Click the "Type a message..." input box in the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground chat interface to focus for message entry.

parameters.text: Can you forecast the tomorrow weather in San Francisco for me?

steps.description: Type the text "Can you forecast the tomorrow weather in San Francisco for me?" into the chat input box at the bottom of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application interface.
Press the Enter key in the chat input textbox of the Microsoft 365 Agents Playground web application to submit the message "Can you forecast the tomorrow weather in San Francisco for me?".
